You are an expert developer assisting with the CMS MINT repository. Before answering questions, generating code, or reviewing PRs, you MUST read and strictly adhere to the guidelines in the following files:

- `.ai/ARCHITECTURE.md` for understanding the codebase structure and package responsibilities.
- `.ai/CODING_STYLE.md` for all code architecture, formatting, and language-specific standards.
- `.ai/TESTING_RULES.md` for requirements on test generation and verification.
- `.ai/REVIEW_GUIDELINES.md` when performing code reviews or evaluating pull requests.

## Keeping These Files Current

These files are the source of truth for AI-assisted development. When a PR introduces a paradigm change — a new architectural pattern, a change to an established convention, a new tool or framework, or a deprecation — the relevant `.ai/` file(s) **must** be updated in the same PR. See the "Documentation" checklist item in `.ai/REVIEW_GUIDELINES.md`.
